name: Hide And Seek
short_description: 'Hide And Seek' is a game where you collect items to escape the house that has been merged with the school you went to and turned into a complicated maze. Escape the randomly generated house and win the bet!
detailed_description:
【Game Overview】
Hide And Seek is a first-person survival horror game.

Jinju, who was playing hide and seek with her friend, falls asleep in the closet.

When I woke up and came out of the closet, I found blood in the bathtub in the basement.
The familiar house was engulfed in darkness and looked completely different from usual.

Aim to escape from the strange house!



【Game Points】


□ Randomly generated stages
The strange house changes form each time you play.
The location of the item changes every time, so let's respond appropriately to the situation and try to escape.

□ Chasers with different characteristics

The pursuer wandering the house uses sight and hearing to detect and chase the player.

Understand the characteristics of each pursuer and deal with them well to survive as long as possible.
